---
title: 'Transit Chart JSON Data Example'
description: 'Example JSON response for Transit Chart Data. Highlights the structure of transit-to-natal aspect calculations and planetary positions.'
---

# Transit Chart Data Example

Endpoint: `/api/v5/chart-data/transit`

## Request Body
```json
{
  "first_subject": {
    "name": "John Doe",
    "year": 1990,
    "month": 1,
    "day": 1,
    "hour": 12,
    "minute": 30,
    "city": "London",
    "nation": "GB",
    "longitude": -0.1278,
    "latitude": 51.5074,
    "timezone": "Europe/London",
    "zodiac_type": "Tropical",
    "houses_system_identifier": "P"
  },
  "transit_subject": {
    "name": "Transit Moment",
    "year": 2024,
    "month": 1,
    "day": 1,
    "hour": 0,
    "minute": 0,
    "city": "London",
    "nation": "GB",
    "longitude": -0.1278,
    "latitude": 51.5074,
    "timezone": "Europe/London"
  }
}
```
